🏡text “HOME” to 520.373.7839 or FILL OUT THE LINK IN BIO FOR INFO⭐️Welcome to the neighborhood where every buyer wins
💰 Prices starting from $326,990 and reaching up to $519,462
📐 Floor plans range from 1,666 to 3,542 sq ft with 3 to 5 bedrooms and up to 4 full baths 
📦 Zero down options available for qualified buyers plus builder incentives and rate buy-downs make this a sweet spot to secure equity
🛏 Open-concept layouts with high ceilings and smart-use floor plans that include studies, game rooms, and flex spaces
🍽 Kitchens built to impress with granite countertops, stainless appliances, and walk-in pantries
🛁 Primary suites that feel like private spas with separate showers, dual vanities, garden tubs, and massive walk-in closets
🎮 Some floor plans include bonus rooms, home offices, media spaces, and upstairs lofts perfect for work, play, or multi-gen setups
🌳 Surrounded by nearly 200 acres of greenbelt, trails, and resort-style amenities like a community pool, splash pad, and playground
🚗 Commuter-friendly with fast access to Loop 1604, 151, and 90 ideal for reaching downtown San Antonio, SeaWorld, Lackland AFB, and more
🎓 Zoned to Northside ISD one of San Antonio’s strongest districts, ideal for long-term value and family-focused buyers
💡 Energy-efficient builds, low-maintenance exteriors, and modern construction with warranty protection included
📉 Starting at just $155–170 per sq ft with low HOA around $500/year perfect for both end-users and rental investors

🇺🇸 Special Section for VA Buyers

🔑 This community is VA loan eligible with zero down payment options
📍 Only 15–20 minutes from Lackland AFB and near multiple military-friendly employers
💸 Qualified VA buyers may receive discounted closing costs, rate buy-downs, and preferred lender perks
🛡️ Secure a brand new, energy efficient home with a builder warranty using your VA benefits with no mortgage insurance required
📲 If you’re active duty, retired, or a military family this is the perfect blend of comfort, location, and long-term value
